title: hieracium benzianum subsp. benzianum
intro: Hieracium benzianum subsp. benzianum, also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Hieracium benzianum subsp. benzianum include its ability to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Hieracium benzianum subsp. benzianum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used topically to treat various ailments.
